meta.title: About PADEL2GO | From clubs, for clubs
meta.description: PADEL2GO brings padel to every club — without barriers, without cost. We come from grassroots club sport ourselves and know what really matters.

hero.description: No corporate strategy. No investor playbook. We played, trained and ran youth programmes ourselves — and one day asked: Why isn't padel simply available in every club?

paragraphs: Florian and David both grew up in club sport — football, tennis, the whole club culture. The shared feeling after training, the friendships that grow there.

The first time we played padel, it was instantly clear: this is the sport that brings people together. Quick to learn, incredibly social, for every age. And yet it was completely missing from the clubs.
story.highlight: So we founded PADEL2GO — not to build a business, but to bring padel to where it belongs: into the clubs.

timeline.label: An idea born in the club world
timeline.desc: Florian and David play padel together — and realise: this sport is missing from local clubs.

timeline.label: First courts & youth programmes
timeline.desc: The first courts go live. Youth, seniors, families — all on the same court.

timeline.label: 8+ active locations
timeline.desc: PADEL2GO grows. More clubs, more courts, more community.

timeline.label: Padel in every third club
timeline.desc: Our goal: make padel as natural as football or tennis.

florian.name: FLORIAN STEINFELDER
florian.bio: Florian has been at home in club sport for years. He has played, organised and run youth programmes himself — and always felt how much power clubs hold. With PADEL2GO he brings that experience straight onto the court: approachable, direct, with real passion for the sport.

david.name: DAVID KLEMM
david.bio: David comes from the club world and loves the sport with all his heart. He makes sure the model genuinely works — so clubs can benefit from PADEL2GO long-term and without risk. Numbers in his head, padel in his heart.

list.title: From clubs, for clubs
list.description: We grew up in club sport ourselves. We know what clubs achieve — and how little they often get back.

list.title: Padel connects
list.description: On the court, generations, cultures and neighbourhoods stand side by side. Every court is a meeting point.

list.title: Away from the screen
list.description: We bring young people back into sport — not by pressure, but because padel is simply fun.

list.title: Partnership on equal terms
list.description: No club has to risk anything with us. We deliver everything, the club benefits. It really is that simple.

list.title: Opening the sport to everyone
list.description: Padel shouldn't be a luxury. Our goal: everyone should have the chance to discover this sport — no matter where they live.

list.title: Doing instead of talking
list.description: We don't promise anything we can't keep. Announce less, deliver more — that's the standard we hold ourselves to.

vision.description: Padel shouldn't be a sport you have to afford. Our €0 model gives every club the chance to offer padel — without investment risk, without bureaucracy. We deliver the courts, the technology and the operation. The club gains new members and a sport with a future.

cards.title: Straight into the clubs
cards.desc: Padel doesn't belong in expensive arenas. We bring the sport to where it belongs: local clubs and communities.

cards.title: €0 for clubs. Always.
cards.desc: The club provides the space, we deliver courts, technology and operation. Completely free. Not today, not tomorrow, never.

goals.title: 10+ locations in planning
goals.description: From Bavaria to northern Germany — we're planning the next locations in clubs all across the DACH region.

goals.title: Padel performance analytics
goals.description: Automatic match analysis, shot tracking and personalised training recommendations — straight from the court.

goals.title: Expansion across Europe
goals.description: Every club deserves to offer padel. Our goal: club padel beyond Germany's borders.

cta.description: No form jungle. No sales pitch. Just an honest conversation about whether PADEL2GO is the right fit for you.
